prompt: Add a new portal section to PortalView.html that shows an 'Admin Tools' panel. It should only be visible to CEO and ADMIN roles. It needs two buttons: 'Rebuild Views' (calls portal_rebuildViews) and 'Refresh Dashboard' (calls portal_refreshDashboard). Show a spinner while the operation runs and display the result in a status message below the buttons.

assertions.text: No let or const in JS block — ES5 only
Checks actor.role === 'CEO' or 'ADMIN' before showing the panel
No http:// or https:// URL references (no external CDN)
Shows a spinner or loading indicator while the call is in flight
Renders server response in a status element after the call completes
